chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No.S- 24 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1.For orders on office objections as flag A. 2.For hearing of main case. 03.3.2025 Mr. Asadullah Arbani, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Asstt: A.G a/w SIP Kifayatullah Narejo, P.S Khanpur Mahar. ==== It is claimed by the petitioner that he owns and possess agricultural land and enjoys muhag right in front of his lands, where he has cultivated sugarcane crop on which the private persons have kept evil eye and time to time they are causing damage to his crop for which he has moved such application to SSP concerned but no action is being taken against them rather the private respondents moved applications twice under Section 22 A and B Cr.P.C against the petitioner for registration of false FIRs which stand dismissed being devoid of merits. However, private respondents are extending threats of dire consequences and false implication in criminal cases for which petitioner approached the concerned police/official respondents for providing protection but to no avail, hence he has maintained instant petition. In response to the notices, the official respondents No.3 files statement for self and on behalf of respondent No.2, taken on record, in which they have denied to have caused any harassment and further assured that they will provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law. Mr.Aijaz Ali Puno files vakalatnama on behalf of private respondents NO. 4, 5, 6 and 8, taken on record. He submits that neither respondents No.4 to 8 have caused any kind of harassment to the petitioner nor taken law into their hands as alleged in the petition nor intend to do so in future.

Mr.Aijaz Ali Puno files vakalatnama on behalf of private respondents NO. 4, 5, 6 and 8, taken on record. He submits that neither respondents No.4 to 8 have caused any kind of harassment to the petitioner nor taken law into their hands as alleged in the petition nor intend to do so in future. In view of above, instant petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioner and his family as and when required by him. JUDGE Shabir/PS
